3393.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
3393.description: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

3394.title: Mmm Bop! Perfect 90s Pop
3394.description: We're bringing you the perfect pop playlist from the 90s.

3395.title: Saved By The 90s!
3395.description: If you need a bit of a break from modern pop, then look no further! The 90s are here to save us, so enjoy these giant hits from a golden decade of music.

3396.title: Never Forget The 90s!
3396.description: With so many legendary artists and so much great music being produced, how could anyone forget the nineties? Well just in case you have, here is a reminder of what made that decade so great.

3397.title: 40 Heartbreak Hits Of The 90s!
3397.description: You're going to need a big box of tissues for this one because we're bringing you 40 heartbreak hits from the 90s!

3398.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1999!
3398.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the second decade of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1999!

3399.title: Truly, Madly, Deeply... 90s Love!
3399.description: Fall in love with the 90s all over again as we play you a selection of the very best ballads the decade had to offer!
